message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
hide methods

class Team << (C,#b7d7b7) >> {
  name: string
  description: string
  ownerId: User
  participants: Participant[]
  topics: Topic[]
}

class Topic << (C,#b7d7b7) >> {
  name: string
  icon: string
  isSequential: boolean
  subtopics: Subtopic[]
}

class Subtopic << (C,#b7d7b7) >> {
  name: string
  description: string
  challenges: Challenge[]
}

class Challenge << (C,#b7d7b7) >> {
  name: string
  body: string
  type: ChallengeType
  selection: string[]
  correct: string[]
  points: number
  feedback: string
}

class ChallengeReport << (C,#b7d7b7) >> {
  userId: User
  challengeId: Challenge
  answer: string[]
  answeredCorrectly: boolean
}

class Participant << (C,#b7d7b7) >> {
  userId: User
  points: number
  status: ParticipantStatus
}

class User << (C,#b7d7b7) >> {
  name: string
  email: string
  educationalInstitution: string
  educationalBackground: EducationalBackground
  birthDate: Date
  points: number
}

enum ParticipantStatus << (E,#f2a08a) >> {
  PENDING
  ACCEPTED
  DISABLED
}

enum EducationalBackground << (E,#f2a08a) >> {
  MIDDLE_INCOMPLETE
  MIDDLE_ONGOING
  MIDDLE_COMPLETE
  HIGH_INCOMPLETE
  HIGH_ONGOING
  HIGH_COMPLETE
  GRADUATION_INCOMPLETE
  GRADUATION_ONGOING
  GRADUATION_COMPLETE
}

enum ChallengeType << (E,#f2a08a) >> {
  INPUT
  RADIO
  CHECKBOX
}

Topic "0..n" o-- "1" Team
Team "1" o-- "0..n" Participant
Topic "1" o-- "0..n" Subtopic
Subtopic "1" o-- "0..n" Challenge

ChallengeReport "1" o-- "1" Challenge
ChallengeReport "1" o-- "1" User

Participant "1" o-- "1" User

Team "1" o-- "1" User

Participant --> ParticipantStatus : status
User --> EducationalBackground : educationalBackground
Challenge --> ChallengeType : type
@enduml
